visitor.text: visiting from one of my posts, GitHub, or a suspiciously long internship email? i put the useful stuff in one place.

paragraphs: heyy, i’m Abdulwahid — a Computer Engineering student at Kocaeli University and an aspiring game developer from Libya, currently based in İzmit.
most of my time goes into software, game development, trying new tools, and building whatever idea i’ve convinced myself “will only take a weekend.”
i’m especially interested in gameplay systems, backend tools, interactive interfaces, and projects where i can understand the full path from data to what the player actually sees.
when i’m not building something, i’m probably teaching English, at the gym, playing games, learning another language, or adding another idea to a list that was already too long.
feel free to reach out on LinkedIn or check what i’m currently building.

resources.title: for game studios
resources.body: i’m moving into game development through C#, game-system experiments, interaction work, and the Imposter party-game project. i’m especially interested in gameplay systems, tools, backend support, and understanding how real teams ship and maintain games.

resources.title: for software teams
resources.body: my software work includes backend automation, desktop applications, graph algorithms, data visualization, APIs, databases, and product tooling. i like projects where i can understand the whole path from data to interface.
